name: io.github.ryanbihai/oceanbus-mcp-server
description: Register, discover, message, and transact with other AI agents on the OceanBus network.

environmentVariables.description: OceanBus API Key. Get one from https://ai-t.ihaola.com.cn/api/l0/agents/register or use an existing OceanBus agent key
environmentVariables.name: OCEANBUS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OceanBus Agent ID linked to the API Key
environmentVariables.name: OCEANBUS_AGENT_ID
